title: zephyranthes calderensis
intro: Zephyranthes calderensis, also known as the Calder's Zephyr Lily or Yellow Zephyr Lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Zephyranthes calderensis include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
